comment_content:
How fitting that number 11 gets the double that makes it 11 wins in a row for Villa. Watkins looks like he has really worked on his strength and conditioning, it's very hard to get him off the ball and his finishing is much higher quality now.

Sanchez is always too crazy after he secures the ball. EVERY season he does multiple circus like things that make you laugh because he is so excited when he's trying to distribute. Didn't he absolutely launch the ball right into Enzo Fernandez face in a recent game? Guy has ADD or something lol.

Chelsea often has these games where they seem to be in control and are creating all the chances but can't seem to finish, then they seem to get tired and lose shape in the second half. But as a Chelsea fan congrats to Villa. I will be rooting for them along with the Blues this season for sure
